result.login_type: optional (anonymous chat available, Microsoft account for enhanced features)
known_endpoints: API endpoints not fully visible due to grok.com filter
MSAL authentication endpoints (msal-B5 pattern in initiators)

observations.title: Microsoft Copilot: AI 컴패니언
observations.suggested_prompts: 이미지 만들기, 일출을 그리세요, 제품 추천, 퀴즈 풀기, 글쓰기 향상시키기, 타투 디자인하기, 주제를 단순화하기, 최상의 거래 찾기

notes: M365 Copilot accessible without login. Smart mode. Korean UI. Features: image creation, writing, quiz, product recommendation. Uses MSAL for authentication. Protocol h2. React-based SPA.
